name: cms-diabetes-measures
description: Bundled CMS clinical quality measures for diabetes: HbA1c poor control (CMS122v6), foot exam (CMS123v6), eye exam (CMS131v6), and medical attention for nephropathy (CMS134v6).

protocols.description: CMS122v6 - Diabetes: Hemoglobin HbA1c Poor Control (> 9%)

meta.title: Diabetes: Hemoglobin HbA1c Poor Control (> 9%)
meta.description: Patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes who have either a hemoglobin A1c > 9.0% or no hemoglobin A1c within the last year.

meta.title: Diabetes: Foot Exam
meta.description: Patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes who have not received a foot exam in the last year.

meta.title: Diabetes: Eye Exam
meta.description: Patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes who have not had a retinal or dilated eye exam by an eye care professional.

protocols.description: CMS134v6 - Diabetes: Medical Attention for Nephropathy

meta.title: Diabetes: Medical Attention for Nephropathy
meta.description: Patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes who have not had a nephropathy screening test in the last year or evidence of nephropathy.
